summary: Phase 1 Refactoring: Centralized recommendationService.js - All 12 frontend tests PASSED. The centralized recommendation service is working correctly. HomeNavigationSection shows recommendations from the centralized service, follow recommendation button fills action input, recommendation indicator shows when action originates from recommendation, and recommendations change dynamically based on user decision history.
critical_code_review_comments: GOOD: recommendationService.js is well-structured as single source of truth for all recommendation calculations
GOOD: calculateRecommendation() implements priority-based decision logic with clear comments
GOOD: analyzeCurrentState() provides proper pattern analysis for current state display
GOOD: calculateCalibrationWeights() extracts calibration logic for reuse across components
GOOD: HomeNavigationSection uses useMemo for performance optimization
GOOD: All interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing
GOOD: RTL layout maintained with dir='rtl' on section elements
GOOD: Consistent direction colors exported from service for UI consistency
NOTE: NextBestDirectionSection is imported but not rendered in PhilosDashboard - appears intentional as HomeNavigationSection handles home tab recommendations
NOTE: RecommendationCalibrationSection requires 3+ followed recommendations to render
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 1 refactoring complete. The recommendationService.js is the centralized source of truth for recommendation calculations. Key exports: calculateRecommendation(), analyzeCurrentState(), calculateCalibrationWeights(), calculateCollectiveGap(), buildRecommendationMetadata(), valueLabels, directionColors, actionSuggestions. HomeNavigationSection and NextBestDirectionSection both use the centralized service. Key data-testids: home-navigation-section, home-action-input, home-follow-recommendation-btn, home-evaluate-btn, recommendation-action, current-state-summary, home-recommendation-indicator. Dynamic recommendations change based on history - tested with recovery→contribution→contribution flow.

feature_tests.test: Evaluate button appears with input value

dynamic_recommendation_tests.result: recommendation changed to לשתף משהו שלמדת
recommendation changed to להציע סיוע לחבר
PASS - different suggestions for same direction

exports: calculateRecommendation - single source of truth for recommendations
analyzeCurrentState - pattern analysis for home display
calculateCollectiveGap - gap between user and collective
buildRecommendationMetadata - metadata for saving with decisions

features: Current state summary with pattern analysis
